findings.description: RCE: command output in response for param 'id'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input to shell commands. Use safe APIs.

findings.description: RCE: command output in response for param 'page'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input to shell commands. Use safe APIs.

findings.description: RCE: command output in response for param 'file'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input to shell commands. Use safe APIs.

findings.description: Local File Inclusion: parameter 'id' includes server-side files. Payload '/proc/self/cmdline' triggered a match.
findings.remediation: Never pass user-controlled data to file-include functions. Use a whitelist of allowed files. Disable allow_url_include in PHP. Implement proper input validation and path canonicalization.

findings.description: Local File Inclusion: parameter 'page' includes server-side files. Payload '/proc/self/cmdline' triggered a match.
findings.remediation: Never pass user-controlled data to file-include functions. Use a whitelist of allowed files. Disable allow_url_include in PHP. Implement proper input validation and path canonicalization.

findings.description: Local File Inclusion: parameter 'file' includes server-side files. Payload '/proc/self/cmdline' triggered a match.
findings.remediation: Never pass user-controlled data to file-include functions. Use a whitelist of allowed files. Disable allow_url_include in PHP. Implement proper input validation and path canonicalization.

findings.description: SSTI: template expression '{{7*7}}' evaluated in param 'id'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input directly to template engines. Use sandboxed rendering.

findings.description: SSTI: template expression '{{7*7}}' evaluated in param 'page'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input directly to template engines. Use sandboxed rendering.

findings.description: SSTI: template expression '{{7*7}}' evaluated in param 'file'.
findings.remediation: Never pass user input directly to template engines. Use sandboxed rendering.

findings.evidence: ID=1 returns similar content as ID=2 (lengths: 75002 vs 75002)
findings.description: Potential IDOR: parameter 'id' may allow access to other users' data.
findings.remediation: Implement object-level authorization. Verify ownership on every resource access.

findings.description: SSRF: Parameter 'q' causes the server to make requests to internal resources. Target 'dict://localhost:11211/stat' returned sensitive data.
findings.remediation: Validate and sanitize all URL inputs. Implement an allowlist of permitted URLs. Block requests to internal IP ranges (RFC1918). Use a URL parser to detect and reject localhost/internal targets. Disable unused URL schemes (file://, dict://, gopher://).

findings.description: SSRF: Parameter 'file' causes the server to make requests to internal resources. Target 'http://localhost/' returned sensitive data.
findings.remediation: Validate and sanitize all URL inputs. Implement an allowlist of permitted URLs. Block requests to internal IP ranges (RFC1918). Use a URL parser to detect and reject localhost/internal targets. Disable unused URL schemes (file://, dict://, gopher://).
